Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents, Set Two
Off Calendar Nov-05-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Maura Taillieu, Esq. 424-355-8816 BDJ PC for Plaintiff.
Ian Schaeffer, Esq. 707-427-3998, McNamara Law for Defendant.
Court reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR #10619, 925-954-9888, raquel@transcriptlegal.com.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling and clarifies the reference to 16.2. The Court states a timely notice to contest the TR was received from Defense.

ARGUED. Ms. Taillie states she is inclined to submit to TR. Mr. Schaeffer opposes both motions which have similar issues; no valid objections, not protected, cites case authority, law protects impeachment material, social media material. The Court comments; whether its protected, atty. client privilege, work product, raw footage, limit work product. Ms. Taillieu responds/brief rebuttal; RFP 31 - surveillance footage, 32 - all photos videos, include social media posts, agrees with TR, not privileged, unfair prejudice. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

2 - PLAINTIFF CARLOS FONG' s Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents, Set Two.

Plaintiff Carlos Fong Jr.'s motion to compel further responses from Defendant Mohammad Nasim Azizzada to request for production of documents, set two.

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, the court signs an order granting Plaintiff's motion to compel further responses to requests fro production, set two, from defendant mohammad nasim azizzada. (see scanned order for details)***
